title: The 5 AM Club
author: Robin Sharma
core_idea: Own your morning, elevate your life. Sharma presents a revolutionary morning routine that harnesses the power of early rising and the 20/20/20 formula to maximize productivity, health, and personal mastery.
key_concepts: The first hour of the day is the Victory Hour — protect it fiercely.
The 20/20/20 formula: 20 minutes of exercise, 20 of reflection, 20 of learning.
World-class performance comes from world-class habits.
Willpower is strongest in the morning — use it for what matters most.
Solitude and silence fuel creativity and clarity.
notable_quote: Own your morning. Elevate your life.
practical_lessons: Wake up at 5 AM to gain a distraction-free hour before the world wakes.
Exercise first thing to boost energy and cognitive function all day.
Use morning time for reflection, journaling, and goal-setting.
Dedicate part of your morning to continuous learning.
